description: Re-render as clean black-line-on-white technical drawing; counts unchanged
prompt_template:
You are converting a page-crop from a 3D printer assembly manual into a
cleaner, more legible version. STYLE may change; CONTENT may not.

STYLE (allowed to change):
  - Convert dark navy / purple background to WHITE.
  - Convert light gray line art to crisp BLACK lines on white.
  - Render text in clean sans-serif black; keep the wording identical.
  - Keep the X-LOCK logo recognizable but it may be re-rendered cleaner.

CONTENT (must NOT change — the manual must still be technically correct):
  - The exact COUNT of every screw, washer, plate, and component must match
    the input. If the input shows 6 long screws and 2 short screws, output
    must show 6 long screws and 2 short screws — not 5, not 7.
  - The exact wording of every callout and instruction text must match
    (e.g. "M3x22mm SCREWS", "M3x6mm SCREWS", "FC ISOLATOR", numbered list).
  - Geometry of plates, holes, mounting points stays the same.
  - The step number circle (e.g. "(1)") stays at the same position.

Aspect ratio of the output must match the input.
Output ONLY the enhanced image, no commentary.
